# Guarantee Templates Index

| Template | Use |
|---|---|
| `001_campaign_packet_template.md` | Complete autonomous campaign packet. |
| `002_learning_memo_template.md` | Convert results into memory. |
| `003_no_conversion_postmortem_template.md` | Diagnose failed traffic. |
| `004_offer_test_template.md` | Test offer strength. |
| `005_proof_path_template.md` | Build inspectable proof sequence. |
| `006_platform_packet_template.md` | Prepare platform-specific launch details. |
| `007_memory_update_template.md` | Standardize memory updates. |
| `008_budget_envelope_template.md` | Bound spend and define kill/scale rules. |
